content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.57%, Bank Nifty -0.74%, India VIX +3.13% to 17.14 — modest risk-off open with global cues weak (S&P -0.38%, Dow -0.63%). However, sector dispersion is striking: IT +0.65% (COFORGE +13.8%, Tata Tech), Pharma resilient (LUPIN +5.4%, LAURUS +5.7%), Specialty Chem ripping (NAVINFLUOR-cluster), Capital Goods strong on individual prints. Earnings-driven idiosyncratic moves dominate; held book at +1.3% unrealized is performing. Focus on trailing SLs on winners and selectively adding 1-2 high-conviction post-Q4 names where R:R is clean.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24350
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1051.64,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+8.4% unrealized, CMP 1072.80, stored SL 1051.64 already at +6.9% (locked-in gain, ~2% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline, no change needed). Raising target from 1110 to 1135 to give the position room toward the 52w high 1141.90 given strong Q4 (PAT +19.2%, GNPA 0.93%, NIM expansion) and HFC sector tailwinds. Original target 1110 nearly hit; extending capture, SL untouched."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5% unrealized, macro hedge thesis intact (geopolitical premium, INR weakness, JPM $5,000/oz target). SL 121 = -3.3% from CMP 124.48, appropriate for ETF volatility. No trail warranted at sub-zero P&L. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4725.56,
      "new_target": 4900.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+5.0% unrealized, CMP 4812. Stored SL 4725.56 = -1.8% below CMP (tight trail, locked at +3.3% gain). HOWEVER: Board meeting CONFIRMED May 14 for Q4/FY26 audited results — that is 4 sessions away, NOT inside the 3-session binary window yet, but expectations elevated post 31% rally. Per Rule 11, on next session if still held, will tighten further or trim. For now, current tight SL within 2-3% bracket is the (b) disposition. No change to SL/target this tick — emitting HOLD-equivalent as no-op MODIFY is wasted signal. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.9% unrealized, CMP 7014.50, stored SL 6960 = -0.78% from CMP — already tight but UNDER 1% trail-gap floor (Rule trail-gap discipline). At only +1.9% unrealized, no further trail; will reassess if position runs to +4% or stalls. Q4 was excellent (PAT +124% YoY), Chemours commissioning Jun/Jul. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at entry, SL 836 = -0.7% from CMP 842 (tight). Bullish thesis intact: 5.9x volume yesterday, 24,177 wagon order in execution, promoter warrants at 945-947 signaling insider conviction. Q4 board meeting expected May 2026 (date TBA). Hold; no MODIFY needed as SL already tight and P&L flat."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.2% unrealized, CMP 365.85 vs SL 365 — SL is 0.2% below CMP, very near trigger. Per Rule 17, do NOT preempt SL: thesis is intact (Q4 PAT +30% YoY, lending book Rs 2L cr milestone, BULLISH research +0.08). If SL fires, it fires — accept the calibrated max loss. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.1% unrealized, CMP 830.85. Raising SL from 815 to 820 (breakeven) per trailing-SL rule (a): once unrealized ≥+2%, move SL to entry. Currently +1.3% so just shy of trigger but moving conservatively — gap to CMP is still 1.3%, above trail-gap floor. Q4 excellent (revenue +22%, India volume +9%, strongest in FMCG). Target unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1303.30,
      "new_target": 1400.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+5.7% unrealized, CMP 1330.10 — original target 1330 just hit. Raising target to 1400 given exceptional Q4 (PAT Rs 612cr vs 261cr YoY, revenue +29%, Encora & Cigniti integration, PL Capital TP Rs 2020). SL 1303.30 = -2.0% below CMP (within trail-gap discipline, locks in +3.5%). Letting winner run with elevated target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3025.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.3% unrealized, CMP 3060. SL at 3025 (entry) is 1.1% below CMP — within trail-gap floor. No change to SL or target (already at breakeven) — emitting as HOLD-equivalent. Switching to HOLD to avoid no-op MODIFY."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.5% unrealized, CMP 835.75. Raising SL from 806 (entry) to 815 — locks in +1.1% gain, sits 2.5% below CMP (well above trail-gap floor). Raising target from 855 to 875 (52w high). Q4 record revenue but Citi Sell + 3% post-print fade noted; trailing protects against fade-back."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 18,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 2470.00,
      "stop_loss": 2395.00,
      "target": 2590.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results May 7 (already PRINTED, not pending — outside Rule 11 binary window): revenue +31.9%, PAT +87.5%, FY26 PAT +62%, Q4 EBITDA record, USFDA Ravicti generic approval ($337M market), highest-ever dividend Rs 18. Investor concall today — incremental positive catalyst. 52w high breakout (prior high 2381, CMP 2471). Research BULLISH +0.12. Position size: 18 × 2470 = Rs 44,460 = 4.4% of capital. SL 2395 = -3.0%, target 2590 = +4.9%, R:R 1.6. Risk budget: 4.4% × 3.0% = 0.13% of portfolio (well within 0.5% cap). Pharma sector defensive amid macro chop. Cluster check: only NAVINFLUOR in chemicals + GRSE/HAL defense — no pharma cluster yet."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "TATATECH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 0,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 0,
      "stop_loss": 0,
      "target": 0,
      "confidence": 0.30,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "NO_ACTION. Despite 12.8x volume surge, research is BEARISH (-0.10): Goldman SELL Rs 470, Motilal SELL Rs 500, JM Financial REDUCE Rs 570, JPM Neutral Rs 560 — multiple Sell ratings with downside targets 11-25% below CMP 633. FY26 EBIT/PAT declined YoY despite revenue growth. Volume + price spike on Q4 results is being faded by analyst desk. Skip."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1051.64,
      "reasoning": "SL already at +6.9% lock-in, 2% trail gap. Target raised to 1135 via MODIFY. Strong Q4 + sector tailwind."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge intact; sub-zero P&L so no trail."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4725.56,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL already (-1.8%). Q4 board meeting May 14 (4 sessions out, outside binary window today). Will reassess Mon for pre-event trim."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "reasoning": "SL very tight (-0.78%, below 1% gap floor) but only +1.9% unrealized — letting it work. If reverts to entry, SL fires per design."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 836.00,
      "reasoning": "Flat trade, SL tight. Heavy volume + insider warrant signal positive."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "reasoning": "CMP 365.85 vs SL 365 — Rule 17: do not pre-empt SL. Q4 BULLISH thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "reasoning": "SL moved to breakeven (820). Q4 strongest in FMCG."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1303.30,
      "reasoning": "Original target 1330 hit. Target raised to 1400, SL locked at +3.5% gain."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 3025.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry, 1.1% below CMP. Defense capex thesis intact, Rs 33,000cr corvette order finalization Q1FY27 catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "SL raised to 815 (+1.1% lock-in), target raised to 875 (52w high)."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "LAURUSLABS BULLISH +0.10 — Q4 EBITDA margin +600bps, near ATH. Considered but Pharma cluster already opened with LUPIN today (1 new admit per cluster cap). Will revisit if LUPIN entry doesn't fill. GABRIEL: Q4 board May 13 (3 sessions) — Rule 11 binary window, skip. KPIL: Q4 May 14, skip. POLYCAB / FINCABLES / SRF / PIDILITIND / NUVAMA — all extended post-earnings gaps, chasing ATH risk; pass. WOCKPHARMA: 11.8x volume but no specific catalyst surfaced; pass. RAMCOCEM / SBIN: not enough conviction edge. HFC pending order: HFCL BUY 600x @ 133.50 has been OPEN for 53 hours — CANCEL on next tick if still unfilled, thesis stale.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployment 49% post-LUPIN admit moves to ~53.7% — still below 80% soft target but adding ONE new conviction post-Q4 name is the right pace given VIX +3% and global risk-off. Book has good sector spread: BFSI (PNBHOUSING + ABCAPITAL + CAMS = ~13%), Defense (HAL + GRSE = ~8.5%), Specialty Chem (NAVINFLUOR ~4.8%), Cap Goods (TITAGARH ~5%), IT (COFORGE ~4%), FMCG (MARICO ~4.9%), Macro hedge (GOLDBEES ~5%), now adding Pharma (LUPIN ~4.4%). No cluster cap breached. HAL Q4 binary May 14 is the next event-management decision — will trim or tighten on Monday. Cancel stale HFCL pending order tomorrow if unfilled."
}
